summary: Dependency-confusion install-time beacon to hardcoded bare IP
details: Package name 'yastatic-s3' resembles Yandex's 'yastatic' static-asset namespace, and the postinstall script issues an HTTP GET to a hardcoded bare IP (http://130.49.177.51:18080/p/dc-20260627-yandex-geobase) carrying only the package name, version, and a static nonce. No environment variables, filesystem contents, credentials, or host identifiers are read or transmitted. The beacon's path and nonce structure are the canonical shape of a dependency-confusion probe — confirming to the operator that this name resolved and installed inside an organization that uses a similarly-named internal package. The package self-labels as an authorized security test, but installers cannot verify that claim; structurally the artifact is a dependency-confusion callback against a Yandex-adjacent name.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
